code:
%%{init: {'theme': 'dark', 'themeVariables': { 'primaryColor': '#2c3e50', 'primaryTextColor': '#ecf0f1', 'primaryBorderColor': '#7f8c8d', 'lineColor': '#ecf0f1', 'secondaryColor': '#34495e', 'tertiaryColor': '#282c34' }}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Forming: TeamCreatedEvent
    Forming --> Active: TeamActivatedEvent
    Active --> Archived: TeamArchivedEvent
    Archived --> Active: TeamRestoredEvent
    Active --> Deleted: TeamDeletedEvent
    Archived --> Deleted: TeamDeletedEvent
    
    %% State styling with classes
    classDef formingState fill:#F39C12,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:black
    classDef activeState fill:#27AE60,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:black
    classDef archivedState fill:#7F8C8D,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:white
    classDef deletedState fill:#C0392B,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:white
    
    class Forming formingState
    class Active activeState
    class Archived archivedState
    class Deleted deletedState
    
    %% Notes
    note right of Forming
        Team is being set up
        Members can be added but team is not fully operational
    end note
    
    note right of Active
        Team is active and can be used by members
        Members can create content and collaborate
    end note
    
    note right of Archived
        Team is archived and read-only
        No new content can be created
        Can be restored at any time
    end note
    
    note right of Deleted
        Team has been permanently deleted
        Cannot be recovered
        All associated data is soft-deleted
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为团队生命周期画一个状态图。团队从创建开始，先进入Forming状态，这个阶段成员可以加入但还不能完全协作。等激活后就变成Active，这时候成员可以创建内容和协作。
明白了，Forming是初始状态，通过TeamCreatedEvent进入。那Active之后呢？团队会不会有关闭或者暂停的情况？
有的，Active可以归档到Archived状态，归档后是只读的，不能创建新内容，但随时可以恢复回Active。另外Active和Archived最终都可以删除到Deleted状态，Deleted是永久删除，无法恢复，所有关联数据都会被软删除。
确认一下：Archived既能从Active来，也能恢复到Active，还能被删除。Deleted只能从Active或Archived进入，没有出口。对吗？
对的。另外我想给每个状态加颜色区分：Forming用橙色表示准备中，Active用绿色表示正常运行，Archived用灰色表示归档，Deleted用红色表示危险状态。
好的，我已经把四个状态和转换关系画好了，也加上了颜色样式。现在给每个状态右侧添加注释说明具体含义吧。
Forming的注释写：团队正在设置中，成员可以加入但团队尚未完全运行。Active写：团队已激活，成员可以使用、创建内容和协作。Archived写：团队已归档且只读，不能创建新内容，但可随时恢复。Deleted写：团队已被永久删除，无法恢复，所有关联数据已软删除。
都添加好了。检查一下：从初始状态到Forming，再到Active，然后可以归档或删除，Archived也能恢复或删除，所有状态都有清晰的注释和颜色区分。这样符合需求吗？
完全符合，这个状态图清晰展示了团队完整的生命周期，从创建、激活、归档到最终删除的所有状态转换都覆盖到了。
